# MusicMetrics - musicmetrics.net

## About
MusicMetrics is a free, open music data aggregation service providing real-time charts, streaming statistics, and analytics from major music platforms including Spotify, YouTube, Apple Music, Deezer, and Shazam.

## Data Sources
- Spotify: Daily and weekly charts, top artists, most streamed songs
- YouTube: Most viewed music videos, trending by country, milestone tracking
- Apple Music: Top songs and albums by country
- Deezer: Global and country charts
- Shazam: Most Shazamed songs worldwide and by country

## Structure
- /en/spotify/ - Spotify streaming charts (global + 40 countries)
- /en/youtube/ - YouTube music video charts and statistics
- /en/apple-music/ - Apple Music charts
- /en/charts/ - Cross-platform chart comparison
- /en/artists/ - Global artist rankings across all platforms
- /en/countries/ - Country-specific charts

## Languages
Available in: English (en), Turkish (tr), Spanish (es), Portuguese (pt), German (de), French (fr), Japanese (ja)

## Update Frequency
Chart data is updated every 6 hours via automated data collection.

## Contact
Website: https://musicmetrics.net
